title: b8943
description: common: fix missing exports in llama-common ( #22340 ) common: refactor common/debug to move abort_on_nan into base_callback_data Passing bool abort_on_nan as template parameter for common_debug_cb_eval is unnecessary and creates an issue with LTO. It should just be a member of the base_callback_data instead. cont : cleanup common : use pimpl in debug.h to reduce header dependencies Move common_debug_cb_user_data's data members (std::regex, std::vector<uint8_t>) into a private impl struct in deb
